profile.name: Mauricio Obando
profile.title: Backend, Data, Cloud, and AI Engineer
profile.subtitle: I build production-grade data platforms, FastAPI backends, AWS architectures, Redshift analytics systems, and LLM-powered workflows.
profile.about: Python-first engineer focused on backend, data, cloud, and AI systems. I work across production APIs, warehouse architecture, FinOps visibility, analytics pipelines, and applied LLM workflows with a strong delivery mindset.
profile.bio: Backend, data, and cloud engineer with hands-on delivery across AWS, Redshift, dbt, Spark, FastAPI, and AI-assisted engineering workflows.
hero_commands: python3.14 fastapi aws redshift dbt llms spark

hero_commands: python3.14 fastapi aws redshift dbt llms spark

engineering_focus.name: Backend Engineering
engineering_focus.description: Production-minded Python services, FastAPI APIs, async workflows, testing, and architecture that stays maintainable under delivery pressure.

engineering_focus.name: Data Engineering
engineering_focus.description: Cloud-scale ingestion, transformation, warehouse modeling, and delivery workflows built for analytics reliability and operational clarity.

engineering_focus.name: LLM Engineering
engineering_focus.description: Applied LLM systems that combine RAG, evaluation, tool calling, structured outputs, and production feedback loops.

engineering_focus.name: Cloud & DevOps
engineering_focus.description: AWS-focused delivery with CI/CD, observability, container workflows, cost awareness, and cloud platform execution.

experience.description: Delivery centered on modern data engineering, AI-oriented workflows, and cloud execution.
highlights: Modern data engineering and platform delivery
Practical AI workflows close to production

experience.description: Worked with AWS customers on architecture reliability, Well-Architected guidance, cost optimization, Redshift performance, and cloud intelligence.
highlights: FinOps visibility with Python, Athena, Glue, S3
Migration and adoption guidance across services

experience.description: Designed and operated high-value data pipelines, dashboard architectures, and marketing analytics workflows for enterprise client programs.
highlights: AWS + GCP ingestion pipelines for Stellantis programs
Tableau and Looker insight delivery patterns
Marketing-moment classification model from Google Ads data

featured_projects.name: AI DataOps Platform
featured_projects.summary: Production-style platform for ingesting, validating, querying, and understanding datasets with LLM support.
featured_projects.problem: Teams need one workflow for data ingestion, validation, warehouse curation, and AI-assisted dataset understanding.
featured_projects.solution: Designed a Python-first platform with async APIs, governed dataset flows, retrieval-enhanced assistance, and operational observability.
featured_projects.architecture: Event-driven ingestion, storage in S3, curated dbt models, vector-backed retrieval, and deployment checks wired through CI/CD.

featured_projects.name: Redshift Performance & Cost Analyzer
featured_projects.summary: Tooling for analyzing Redshift workloads, WLM behavior, and cost optimization opportunities.
featured_projects.problem: Redshift teams often lack a single view that combines workload patterns, tuning signals, and cost guidance.
featured_projects.solution: Built a diagnostic layer that reviews query history, warehouse behavior, and cost signals to surface practical optimization paths.
featured_projects.architecture: Workload snapshots flow into warehouse diagnostics, operational metrics, and recommendation outputs for both provisioned and serverless setups.

featured_projects.name: LLM Healthcare / HL7 Agent
featured_projects.summary: AI agent that classifies HL7 messages, extracts structured patient context, and evaluates relevance for healthcare workflows.
featured_projects.problem: HL7 payloads are noisy, domain-heavy, and difficult to triage quickly inside operational healthcare flows.
featured_projects.solution: Designed an agent workflow that parses messages, enriches context, and produces structured outputs for downstream review.
featured_projects.architecture: HL7 ingestion feeds prompt pipelines, retrieval context, tool-calling steps, and evaluation datasets for safer iteration.

featured_projects.name: Cloud Cost Intelligence Dashboard
featured_projects.summary: AWS FinOps dashboard that analyzes service usage and recommends cost optimizations.
featured_projects.problem: Cloud teams need cost transparency that is technical enough for engineers and practical enough for platform planning.
featured_projects.solution: Combined billing, usage, and warehouse views into an engineering-friendly dashboard that supports cost-aware decisions.
featured_projects.architecture: Cost signals land in S3 and Athena, are modeled into decision views, and feed recommendation panels for engineering review.

featured_projects.name: FastAPI Production Template
featured_projects.summary: Backend template with production-ready architecture, delivery guardrails, and CI/CD foundations.
featured_projects.problem: Teams moving fast still need consistent architecture, migrations, testing, and deployment checks from day one.
featured_projects.solution: Created a reusable backend foundation that emphasizes clean structure, observability, and readiness for team scale.
featured_projects.architecture: Layered application boundaries, database migrations, test harnesses, container builds, and pipeline automation.

certifications.title: Introduction to TensorFlow for Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning
